english_text: Concentric circles: outer SPIRIT (روح / SPIRITUAL); middle قلب | عقل (INTELLECT / MIND, SPIRIT, SPIRITUAL); inner نفس (SELF SOUL / EGO); centre BODY.
alt_text: Four nested circles: outermost yellow 'روح / SPIRIT', then green 'قلب | عقل' (with labels SPIRITUAL / INTELLECT / MIND / SPIRIT around), then grey 'نفس / SELF SOUL / EGO', innermost dark grey 'BODY' with a human silhouette.
notes: Composite anthropology diagram: the human as nested layers from outer Spirit to inner Body.
